prompt:
Design an industrial-strength manufacturing command center dashboard for "ANJANI AI" — a PP woven fabric factory in Surat, Gujarat. Think Siemens ICX meets Tesla factory OS meets Naologic ERP. This is where the factory floor meets AI intelligence.

DESIGN PHILOSOPHY: "The Digital Factory Floor." Warm industrial lighting. Concrete and steel meeting glass and AI. High-density information that feels organized, not cluttered. The CEO monitors their entire operation — machines, customers, orders, AI agents — from one screen.

COLOR SYSTEM:
- Background: Warm dark gray #0f0f12 (feels like factory floor concrete, not cold black)
- Cards: border-white/10, bg-white/[0.04], subtle warm tint, rounded-xl
- Factory Amber #f59e0b: Production, machinery, factory-floor metrics, primary actions
- Cool Data Blue #3b82f6: Analytics, reports, historical data
- AI Cyan #55e6ff: AI features, automation, intelligence (the one futuristic touch)
- Emerald #38ef7d: Online, running, confirmed, success
- Red #ef4444: Stopped, escalation, urgent

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

LAYOUT: Three-column industrial cockpit. Full height, no scroll. Desktop 1440x900.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

LEFT COLUMN (280px) — Factory Navigation + Runtime:

Top branding: "ANJANI AI" logo with subtle amber→cyan gradient and small sparkle animation.

Navigation items (vertical list, icons + badges):
- 🏭 Command Center (active, amber glow left border)
- 💬 Customer Chats (12 badge, green if messages waiting)
- 🧠 Guru AI (3 badge — pending owner inputs, red if >0)
- 📋 Quotes (5 badge)
- ⚙️ Production (67% badge)
- 💰 Pricing
- 📊 Analytics
- 📝 Templates

Middle section — "RUNTIME" (uppercase label, industrial feel):
- Ravi AI: Toggle switch (ON/OFF) with green/red indicator
- Auto Reply: Toggle switch (ON/OFF)
- Sales Mode: Toggle switch (ON/OFF)
- Status: "ChakraHQ Connected" with green dot + version "v22.0"
- Status: "Sarvam 105B" with green dot

Bottom section — "LIVE CUSTOMERS":
Mini list of 5 online WhatsApp contacts:
- Green dot + name + "Online" or "2m ago"
- Compact, industrial — just enough to see who's active

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

CENTER COLUMN (flex-1) — Main Workspace:

SECTION 1 — "FACTORY PULSE" (top row, 6 industrial KPI cards):
- Active Chats: 12 (cyan, MessageCircle icon)
- Quotes Today: 5 · ₹2.8L (violet, FileText icon)
- Production: 67% (amber, Factory icon)
- Revenue Pipeline: ₹8.5L (emerald, Indian Rupee icon)
- Knowledge: 128 nodes (cyan, Brain icon)
- Pending Inputs: 3 (RED if >0, AlertTriangle icon)

Each KPI card: Dark industrial card with subtle top-down lighting effect (brighter top border), icon top-left, large tabular number (JetBrains Mono), subtitle in slate. Subtle hover lift.

SECTION 2 — "PRODUCTION HEALTH" (largest section, middle):
Two-part view:

LEFT (60%): Area chart — 7-day factory load forecast
- X-axis: Mon-Sun, Y-axis: Tons
- Booked load = Violet gradient fill with glow
- Available capacity = Emerald dashed reference line
- Dark chart grid, glowing data points at key values
- Chart title: "7-DAY LOAD FORECAST" in uppercase industrial label

RIGHT (40%): "LOOM GRID"
- Title: "45 LOOMS — REAL-TIME STATUS"
- Grid of 45 small squares (9×5) representing each loom:
  - Green (#38ef7d) = Running/Available
  - Blue (#3b82f6) = Partially booked
  - Amber (#f59e0b) = Fully booked
  - Red (#ef4444) = Maintenance/Stopped
- Below grid: Legend + "Click loom for details" hint

SECTION 3 — "CUSTOMER COMMUNICATIONS HUB" (bottom section):
This is the WHATSAPP CHAT MONITORING area. Split view:

LEFT HALF: "Live WhatsApp Chats" list (compact rows)
- 6 chat preview rows: avatar, name, last message, time, status dot
- Search bar at top to filter by name/phone
- "ChakraHQ Live" badge with green pulsing dot
- Selecting a chat highlights it with cyan left border

RIGHT HALF: Active chat conversation view
- Header with customer name, phone, "OPEN" badge
- Message area: scrollable conversation
  - INBOUND messages (from customer): left-aligned, warm gray glass bubbles, rounded-2xl with small top-left corner
  - OUTBOUND messages (owner/AI replies): right-aligned, cyan gradient bubbles with subtle glow
  - System messages: centered, tiny glass pills, slate-500
  - Timestamps on each message (tiny, JetBrains Mono)
- Reply bar at bottom:
  - Glass input field: "Reply via WhatsApp..."
  - Send button: Amber gradient (industrial primary action)
  - "Ravi AI monitoring" indicator — small cyan pulsing dot

SECTION 4 — "ORDERS PIPELINE" (bottom-most):
Horizontal kanban-style pipeline — 5 stages:
Enquiry (12) → Quoting (5) → Confirmed (9, amber highlight "3 awaiting payment") → Production (7) → Complete (7)

Each stage: Industrial column with subtle vertical separators. Stage name (uppercase label), count, and a mini preview card showing customer name + specs + amount. Cards have colored left-border accents based on priority.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

RIGHT COLUMN (340px) — Intelligence Panel:

Header: "AI INTELLIGENCE" with emerald "ALIVE" badge + pulsing dot

Card 1 — "LIVE AI STATE" (cyan left border):
- "Ravi Agent: Analyzing customer intent" with Zap icon
- "Backend: Blocking until deterministic pricing"
- "Production: 67% capacity available"
- "Last decision: Approved quote for Rahul (₹1.64L)"
- Mini activity indicator: 3 dots animating

Card 2 — "RECENT ACTIVITY" (scrollable feed):
Streaming event log with colored dots and JetBrains Mono timestamps:
- 🔵 [14:22] Ravi replied to Nikhil (WhatsApp)
- 🟣 [14:15] Quote generated ₹83.5K — Priya
- 🟢 [14:08] Production started — Order #8
- 🔴 [13:52] Escalation: Nikhil needs menu help
- 🟢 [13:30] Payment confirmed ₹1.64L — Rahul
- 🔵 [13:15] New enquiry: 36" 3.5g Silver — Amit

Card 3 — "AI MEMORY EVENTS" (knowledge nodes):
4 mini glass cards with scope badges:
- "meter_weight:36:3.5:unlam" = 148 g/m [customer_visible · green]
- "delivery:Patna" = 3 days standard [customer_visible · green]
- "owner_tone" = casual Hinglish mix [internal_only · amber]
- "min_order" = 500 kg all sizes [customer_visible · green]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

INDUSTRIAL DESIGN ELEMENTS:
- Section headers in ALL CAPS with letter-spacing ("FACTORY PULSE", "PRODUCTION HEALTH")
- Subtle vertical separators between major sections (1px, white/5)
- Cards have 1px top-down gradient borders — brighter at top edge (simulating overhead factory lighting)
- Numbers in JetBrains Mono for perfect alignment
- All Indian Rupee amounts use ₹ symbol
- Warm, productive atmosphere — NOT cold cyberpunk
- The amber elements should feel like warm factory floor lights
- Cyan elements are the futuristic AI touch in an otherwise industrial space

Make this feel like the command center of a modern, AI-augmented factory. The WhatsApp chat monitoring should feel like a natural part of operations — just another production line to manage.

DEVICE: Desktop 1440x900
